title: CAN-to-Ethernet Gateway
brief: Dual-network bridge translating CAN FD frames to UDP/IP with deterministic latency under 500 µs at 10 000 frames/s on STM32H7 + FreeRTOS.

title: Linux BSP for Custom i.MX8 Board
brief: Yocto-based board support package with custom device tree, SPI display driver, out-of-tree CAN FD module, and A/B OTA update via U-Boot.

title: OTA Bootloader with ECDSA Verification
brief: Dual-bank STM32L5 bootloader with elliptic-curve firmware authentication, OTP-based anti-rollback, and factory recovery mode over UART/CAN.

title: BLDC Motor Controller
brief: FOC-based sensorless drive with current-mode PI running at 20 kHz PWM on STM32G4, achieving 0–6000 RPM with CMSIS-DSP math acceleration.

title: Industrial IoT Gateway
brief: Edge gateway aggregating Modbus RTU, CAN, and 4–20 mA sensor data to AWS IoT Core via MQTT over LTE-M with SQLite local buffering.
